## Temporary crop harvest

```{r}
#| label: temporary crop harvest table

parcel_plot_crop_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "temp_crop_harvest_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::temp_crop_harvest(
  parcel_plot_crop_df = parcel_plot_crop_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  categories_df = params_df$q_categories_df[[1]],
  crop_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$temp_crop_harvest_crop_id_var),
  crop_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$temp_crop_harvest_crop_vals[[1]]),
  harvest_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$temp_crop_harvest_harvest_var),
  harvest_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$temp_crop_harvest_harvest_val),
  why_not_harvest_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$temp_crop_harvest_why_not_harvest_var),
  group_var = "supervisor",
  json_qnr_path = fs::path(params_df$dirs[[1]]$qnr, "document.json")
)

```
